response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced full-stack and web developer but lacks almost all critical qualifications for this embedded networking role. Most notably, they do not possess the required native-level Japanese proficiency. Furthermore, their background lacks recent C programming, Linux kernel modification, and essential L2/L3 networking or security protocol (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X) experience.
strengths: Extensive mid-to-senior level software engineering experience across various modern stacks and architectures.
Proven ability to work with Linux environments, Docker, and CI/CD pipelines.
Strong track record of open-source contributions and full-lifecycle project ownership.
concerns: Lacks the required native-level Japanese language proficiency.
No demonstrated experience with embedded Linux kernel modifications or UNIX C programming in the last decade.
Missing core domain knowledge in L2/L3 networking and embedded security protocols like MACsec or 802.1X.
